title: Smooth Pixels Texture Pack
description: Smooth Pixels is a pack of simple and beautiful textures for your Minecraft world.
body:
# **Smooth Pixels Texture Pack – Simplify and Beautify Your Game ✨**

Give your world a fresh new look without losing the essence of the game with Smooth Pixels Texture Packs. This texture pack unifies the different shades of default blocks and elements, creating a cleaner, more cohesive, and visually appealing experience. 

Single Pixels has been renamed to Smooth Pixels Texture Pack

> 🎨 Minimalism without losing identity – Keep the game’s spirit with a refined touch.

> 🌍 Unified tones – Say goodbye to messy textures and enjoy a smoother experience.

> ✨ Beauty in simplicity – Highlight important details without distractions.

Whether you're a detail-oriented builder or just want a more pleasant experience, Smooth Pixels Texture Packs will transform your world while staying true to its original charm.

If you have found bugs in the Texture Pack, you can let me know on my Discord Server, I would greatly appreciate it! ^.^
If you would like to donate something to help me continue developing Smooth Pixels, I would really appreciate it.
